name: Apple Swirl Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel, core, and chop apples into small pieces. Mix together with 3 tablespoons sugar and cinnamon. Set aside.
2. In a large bowl, combine the sugar and cooking oil; beat until smooth.
3. Add eggs, orange juice, and vanilla to the mixture. Beat until well combined.
4. Sift together flour, baking powder, and salt. Gradually add this dry mixture to the creamed mixture. Beat until smooth.
5. Pour one-third of the batter into a greased and floured 12-cup bundt pan. Alternately pour in half of the apple mixture.
6. Repeat with another third of the batter and another layer of the apple mixture.
7. End with a final layer of batter on top.
8. Bake at 325 degrees F for 60 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Cool in the pan for 10 to 15 minutes. Turn out onto a wire rack or serving plate to complete cooling.
10. Sprinkle with confectioners sugar before serving.
